provenance.title: The Founding Trilogy, Book 1 — reader notes

records.title: Chapter 1: The recruit arrives at Ravenhold
facts: Mara Venn is introduced as a 17-year-old conscript with no prior combat training.
Ravenhold Keep is a mountain garrison controlled by the Warden's Order at the story's start.
Warden Sethe is the fortress commander and Mara's first authority figure.
quotesOrRefs: "Nobody leaves Ravenhold the same." — Warden Sethe, Ch. 1

records.title: Chapter 14: Sethe's betrayal is revealed
facts: Warden Sethe is revealed to have secretly sworn to the Ashen Pact before the events of Book 1.
This reveal reframes Sethe's earlier mentorship of Mara as manipulation.
The reveal is a hard spoiler: it must not surface before Book 1 Chapter 14.
quotesOrRefs: Reveal scene, Ch. 14 — Sethe's pact-mark is exposed during the siege.
